events.body: {"base_rev":"cdc6ea3c7f7f6a0820894912ab84a56e8edb092a","classification":"no_changes_unjustified","detail":"mixed_commit_and_no_changes_rationale","rationale":"The attempt produced a no_changes rationale, but it does not prove the bead is already satisfied or identify a durable blocker. rationale: verification_command: git diff --exit-code cdc6ea3c7f7f6a0820894912ab84a56e8edb092a HEAD -- . ':(exclude).ddx/executions/20260703T002557-4122ce2f'
